name: Sleeping Quarters
description:
This peaceful room is another of Elrond's guest rooms, used by favored
travellers or wayfarers for a night.  A low bed rests against the wall to the
east, and the southern wall holds a large mirror.  There is a large window to
the west of the mirror, through which the singing and sounds of Valfenda can be
heard.  The flat ceiling of the room is supported by dark beams, intricately
carved.  Although the room itself is not large, you have the feeling that
someone great once stayed here.
